overrides_something.name: overrides_something
overrides_something.value: "menu_item_overrides"."price_paise" is not null or "menu_item_overrides"."is_available" is not null

merged_into_set_iff_status.name: merged_into_set_iff_status
merged_into_set_iff_status.value: ("table_sessions"."status" = 'merged_into' and "table_sessions"."merged_into_session_id" is not null) or ("table_sessions"."status" != 'merged_into' and "table_sessions"."merged_into_session_id" is null)

numbered_iff_finalised.name: numbered_iff_finalised
numbered_iff_finalised.value: ("bills"."status" = 'draft' and "bills"."invoice_no" is null) or ("bills"."status" = 'discarded' and "bills"."invoice_no" is null) or ("bills"."status" not in ('draft','discarded') and "bills"."invoice_no" is not null)
